files_downloaded.description: 2024 Elk Management Unit data by hunting district - includes elk counts, population goals, and harvest data
Infographic explaining how bonus points affect draw odds for special permits
Infographic explaining drawing statistics reports - quotas and applicant proportions
Nonresident combination license preference point statistics infographic
FAQ for nonresident combo and deer/elk permits
2024 Region 1 annual elk report - harvest by hunting district, method, trends (31 pages)
2023 Region 1 mule deer report - population and harvest data by hunting district (30 pages)
2024-2025 deer and elk hunting regulations, season structures, and boundary changes
2024 deer and elk regulation pages with permit quotas by hunting district (80 pages)
Region 4 elk season setting data - harvest, population counts, and management recommendations
Region 4 deer and elk season-setting justifications with harvest survey data by hunting district
Detailed bonus points FAQ explaining draw system mechanics and odds calculations

needs_manual.description: Interactive drawing statistics portal - searchable by species (Elk, White-tailed/Mule Deer, Antelope, etc.) showing applicants, successful draws, and success percentages by permit type
needs_manual.reason: Data is served dynamically via JavaScript/AJAX. Must be queried interactively by selecting species and hunt type. No bulk download or PDF export option available. Requires manual scraping or browser automation to capture draw odds data.

needs_manual.description: Individual draw results lookup - check personal draw results by applicant
needs_manual.reason: Requires login/applicant ID to access. Individual lookup only, not aggregate data.

needs_manual.description: Harvest estimates portal - has reports for bear, wolf, turkey, upland birds, furbearer, mountain lion but deer/elk harvest data is NOT listed on this page
needs_manual.reason: Deer and elk harvest data appears to be distributed across regional reports and commission meeting documents rather than centralized harvest report PDFs. Regional reports for Regions 2, 3, 5, 6, 7 would need to be located individually.

needs_manual.description: 2025 Hunting Forecasts page - contains regional harvest summaries and population estimates for deer and elk
needs_manual.reason: Page content is HTML-based with regional forecast data. Would need to be fetched and parsed for harvest numbers.

notes: Montana FWP does not publish a single consolidated 'Big Game Harvest Report' PDF for deer and elk like some other states. Harvest data is distributed across regional annual reports and commission meeting documents.
The primary source for draw odds data is the interactive portal at myfwp.mt.gov/fwpPub/drawingStatistics which requires browser-based interaction to query by species and permit type.
The 80-page deer_elk_regs_pages_2024.pdf contains permit quotas by hunting district which are essential for understanding draw odds.
Regional elk and deer reports (like region1_elk_report_2024.pdf) contain the most detailed harvest data by hunting district including harvest method breakdowns.
Only Region 1 and Region 4 reports were found via search. Reports for Regions 2, 3, 5, 6, and 7 likely exist but their URLs were not discovered.
Montana uses a bonus point system (not preference points) for deer/elk special permits, meaning higher points improve odds but do not guarantee a draw.
